Title: Planet Mark / UVDB routes missing authentication
Impact: Business-sensitive carbon/UVDB data was accessible without auth
Evidence: src/api/routes/planet_mark.py (16 endpoints now with CurrentUser); src/api/routes/uvdb.py (13 endpoints); tests/unit/test_auth_enforcement.py (+14 pairs)
Root_Cause: Modules built as standalone; auth never added
Containment: RESOLVED — auth guards on all 31 endpoints
Fix: Auth guards + tenant isolation added; integration tests updated

Title: SLO metrics endpoint unauthenticated
Impact: Internal SLO/SLI data exposed without auth
Evidence: src/api/routes/slo.py (CurrentUser added) — BUT router NOT mounted (see F-009)
Containment: RESOLVED — auth added; F-009 tracks mounting gap
Tests_Validation: Auth enforcement test covers SLO endpoints

Title: Coverage threshold at 35%
Impact: Below industry standard (60%+); minimal safety net
Root_Cause: Threshold lowered during uplift; never raised
Fix: Write behavioral tests for incident_service, audit_service, reference_number; raise fail_under
Tests_Validation: CI unit-tests passes at new threshold

Title: No Content Security Policy header
Evidence: src/main.py SecurityHeadersMiddleware (L30-40) — CSP added with strict defaults
Fix: Strict CSP: default-src self; script-src self; frame-ancestors none
Tests_Validation: Security header test validates CSP presence

Title: Mypy type safety debt (30 overrides — GOVPLAT-004)
Impact: Type errors masked in workflow engine / risk scoring / AI services
Fix: Resolve module-by-module; reduce 5/sprint; set ceiling; CI gate on count

Title: No Playwright E2E test specs
Impact: Frontend user journeys untested in browser context
Root_Cause: Playwright added but specs never written
Fix: Build E2E suite: login, incident CRUD, dashboard, audit, portal
Observability: E2E pass rate in CI dashboard

Title: Flake8 overly permissive ignores
Impact: F401/F841 global ignores mask dead code; max-complexity=20
Evidence: flake8 — extend-ignore includes F401 F841; max-complexity=20
Root_Cause: Ignores added to unblock CI during rapid development
Fix: Reduce max-complexity to 15; fix complex functions
Tests_Validation: Flake8 CI passes with tightened rules

Title: Rate limiter authenticated multiplier never applies
Impact: Authenticated users get same limits as anonymous; 2x multiplier dead code
Root_Cause: Identifier prefix changed from user: to token: without updating multiplier
Containment: No immediate security risk (lower limits apply)
Tests_Validation: Unit test: authenticated client gets 2x; anonymous gets 1x
Observability: Log rate limit hits with is_authenticated

Title: SLO router not mounted — endpoints unreachable
Impact: SLO/SLI metrics endpoints exist but never registered; SLOMetricsMiddleware data inaccessible
Evidence: src/api/routes/slo.py defines router; src/api/__init__.py has no slo import; src/main.py has no slo reference
Root_Cause: SLO module developed after router aggregation; never added
Fix: Add slo router to src/api/__init__.py with include_router

Title: OpenTelemetry vs OpenCensus dependency mismatch
Impact: azure_monitor.py uses OTel API but deps install OpenCensus; _HAS_OTEL=False; no tracing
Evidence: azure_monitor.py try/except ImportError; requirements.txt has opencensus; analytics-baseline.md notes migration pending
Root_Cause: Code refactored for OTel but deps never updated
Containment: App runs fine; just no APM/tracing
Fix: Replace opencensus with opentelemetry packages; regenerate lockfile
Tests_Validation: Verify _HAS_OTEL=True in startup; traces in Azure Monitor

Title: Employee portal creates records without tenant_id
Impact: submit_quick_report creates Incident/Complaint without tenant_id; orphaned records
Evidence: src/api/routes/employee_portal.py L195-220: Incident() constructor has no tenant_id; no auth
Root_Cause: Portal designed as public; tenant association never considered
Containment: Records exist but invisible to tenant queries
Fix: Add DEFAULT_PORTAL_TENANT_ID from config; set on creation
Tests_Validation: Integration test: portal record has valid tenant_id
Observability: Alert on records with null tenant_id

Title: ADR numbering collision
Evidence: docs/adr/ — 9 files with 3 unique number collisions
Root_Cause: ADRs created by different contributors without checking
Fix: Renumber to ADR-0001..ADR-0009; create README index
Tests_Validation: CI validates no duplicate ADR numbers
